title: Nvidia RTX 3060 comeback in 2026 could alleviate soaring GPU prices and memory shortages rumored RTX 5050 9GB abruptly shelved amid speculation
summary: The Nvidia RTX 3060 may alleviate GPU price pressures and shortages if relaunched at a competitive price. This could provide a more affordable option for gamers and content creators. The move may also signal the shelving of the RTX 5050 9GB.
insight: Relaunching the RTX 3060 could balance GPU market supply and demand.

title: Bluetooth tracker hidden in a postcard and mailed to a warship exposed its location $5 gadget put a $585 million Dutch ship at risk for 24 hours
summary: A Dutch journalist hid a Bluetooth tracker in a postcard mailed to a Dutch Navy ship, revealing its location for 24 hours before it was found and disabled, putting the $585 million ship at risk.
insight: Vulnerabilities in naval security can have severe financial and operational consequences.

title: KTC M27T6S 27-inch QHD Mini LED gaming monitor review: Affordable, colorful, and bright
summary: The KTC M27T6S 27-inch QHD mini LED gaming monitor offers high brightness, vibrant colors, and a 200 Hz refresh rate.
insight: Exceptional gaming performance at an affordable price point matters

title: Minisforum's beastly N5 Max NAS comes powered by AMD Strix Halo $2,899 for 'AI NAS' with pre-installed OpenClaw, supports up to 200TB capacity
summary: Minisforum's N5 Max NAS is a high-capacity AI NAS, launching on April 23, 2026, at $2,899. It is powered by AMD Strix Halo and comes pre-installed with OpenClaw.
insight: AI-enhanced NAS offers high-capacity storage and advanced computational capabilities.

title: Techie buys fake Ledger Nano S+ hardware crypto wallet and almost falls for phishing a convincing clone would have caught newbies unaware
summary: A cybersecurity expert discovered counterfeit Ledger Nano S+ hardware wallets in China, which could have led to phishing attacks on unsuspecting buyers. The clone's authenticity was convincing, posing a threat to new crypto users. Experts warn of the potential danger.
insight: Counterfeit hardware wallets pose significant risks to crypto users' security.

title: Intel Core Ultra 250K Plus vs AMD Ryzen 5 9600X faceoff battle for the best $200 CPU
summary: Intel Core Ultra 250K Plus and AMD Ryzen 5 9600X face off in a battle for the best $200 CPU, each offering unique strengths in gaming, productivity, and power consumption.
insight: Power efficiency and performance vary significantly between Intel and AMD offerings.

title: SNK revives the mighty Neo Geo in modern form new AES+ system plays classic games without emulation
summary: SNK is reviving the Neo Geo in modern form with the AES+, which will play classic games natively without emulation, set to release in November.
insight: Native game compatibility preserves original gaming experience and quality

title: Microsoft offers $2 million sweepstake for Edge users, but no one noticed for a month $1 million cash, Mercedes-Benz cars among prizes in desperate push for users
summary: Microsoft has launched a $2 million sweepstake for Edge browser users, offering prizes including $1 million cash and Mercedes-Benz cars.
insight: Microsoft's desperate push for Edge adoption amidst declining browser market share.

title: Backblaze silently redefines 'unlimited' backups and users discover it's not backing up Dropbox and OneDrive as firm leans heavier into AI storage services, changes could signal shift away from home backups
summary: Backblaze redefines 'unlimited' backups, excluding Dropbox and OneDrive, sparking user confusion.
insight: Cloud storage limits redefine user expectations of 'unlimited' backup services

title: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang nearly lost his composure when pressed on selling chips to China You re not talking to someone who woke up a loser
summary: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang believes blocking China from AI chip sales is a 'losing proposition' that doesn't make sense, as China is the second biggest market for AI chips.
insight: Blocking a massive market can have devastating economic consequences

title: BeagleConnect Zepto A $1 computer based on TI MSPM0L1117 Cortex-M0+ MCU
summary: BeagleConnect Zepto is an open-source, $1 computer based on a Cortex-M0+ MCU, offering mikroBus headers, Qwiic connectors, and a JTAG connector for debugging and expansion.
insight: Ultra-low-cost, highly accessible microcontroller-based development platform emerges.

title: IPv6 traffic reaches parity with IPv4 for the first time, Google data shows
summary: IPv6 traffic briefly surpassed IPv4 usage in March 2023, reaching parity.
insight: IPv6 adoption represents a significant shift towards a more modern internet.

title: Xbox expansion cards are now cheaper than SSDs, and PC users are repurposing them
summary: Xbox expansion cards are now cheaper than SSDs and being repurposed
insight: Gaming console parts can be more cost-effective storage options suddenly

title: Blue Origin prepares to reuse New Glenn booster in bid to challenge SpaceX
summary: Blue Origin aims to reuse its New Glenn booster in a bid to challenge SpaceX's dominance in reusability. The mission, scheduled for Sunday, will use the same booster that flew and landed in November. This marks a significant milestone for Blue Origin in launch economics.
insight: Reusable boosters revolutionize launch economics with significant cost savings.

title: Nvidia could bring back the 12GB RTX 3060 as supply issues disrupt GPU roadmap
summary: Nvidia may bring back the 12GB RTX 3060 due to supply issues. The move could replace a delayed version of the RTX 5050. The RTX 3060 is expected to return in June.
insight: Nvidia adjusts GPU roadmap to address supply chain disruptions.
